feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC - Input control Date range - Setting ranges
entry.content:
Hello,

when i try to set an earlier date then the start date the selection for the end date is not possible.

I cant confirm the date and the calendar remains open.

I receive the error "The start date cannot be later than the end date.

 

Is there any way to fix this?

 

Kr

entry.title: SAC Percentage calculation on P&L accounts, depending from account position
entry.content:
Hello Experts

I have a Fact table of P&L values with account codes and balance, and a public dimension account model containing the structure of a P&L (with hierarchy and some formula for some labels), and then I created a table dashboard that shows the P&L structure with the balance of each account.

This is an extract of the table

An example of formula label in the public dimension account model is:

“Gross profit Retailers” = “A1 – Revenues Retailers” + “B1.1 – COGS Retailers” + “B1.2 – Incentive/Commissions Retailers”

 

The achieve of my request is to calculate the % of each account depending of the position of accounts

 

Upper part of P&L

In the table, I need to calculate the % for each account divided by Revenue for each type

Example Type = Retailers

For each account I need to calculate % referring to “A1 – Revenues Retailers” value, as example 

Account 3000 = (57.10 / 14909.90) * 100 = 0.38%

Account 4200 = (-4380.28 / 14909.90) * 100 = -29.37%

The account “B1.1 – COGS Retailers” value is calculated automatically by SAC (because is the father of some accounts), and I should show the % calculated as (-4389.99 / 14909.90) * 100 = -29.44%

For account “Gross profit Retailers”, it should be (10456.85 / 14909.90) * 100 = 70.13%

 

The same logic should be applied to other type Private , Distributors and IC, but it should be changed the Revenue value, that is respectively "A2 – Revenues Privates” , "A3 – Revenues Distributors ”, "A4 – Revenues IC”

 

Central part of P&L

For account “Total COGS”, it should be “Total COGS” / “Total Revenues” * 100, that is (-4389.99 / 14909.90) * 100 = -29.44%

For account “Total Incentive/commissions”, it should be “Total Incentive/commissions” / “Total Revenues” * 100, that is (-63.05 / 14909.90) * 100 = -0.42%

For account “Total Gross profit”, it should be “Total Gross profit” / “Total Revenues” * 100, that is (10456.85 / 14909.90) * 100 = 70.13%

 

Below part of P&L

For account below “Total Gross profit”, the % of each account should be calculated referring to “Total Revenues”

Example

% C = (79.70 / 14909.90) * 100 = 0.53%

% D = (-412.86 / 14909.90) * 100 = -2.76%

% E = (-1311.34 / 14909.90) * 100 = -8.79%

Inside each category C, D, E etc, are presents various accounts and for each one, the % should be calculated over same account, that is “Total Revenues”

I hope this explaination is quite clear.

Any ideas or solution is appreciated

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Table on SAC with Top N total, others and Total
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I need to build a table on SAC with TOP N customers. The total shown is the total of all customers (this a limitaion on SAC note - 2716173). I need to build a table that shows: Total of Top N, Othes (Total Customers - Total of Top N), and Total Customers. 

Example:

I have build "Total of Top N" and "Others" with formula bar, but when changing Top 10 or a filter of the story the formulas are gone. Can´t make any calculated or restricted measure, because I'm using measures on columns. 

Any advice of how to solve this with standard features?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Overwrite dimension filter using SAC Add-in
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I have 2 sources of information: live model and import model. 

I have table 1 as:

Table 2 as:

And I need to build a table with Account A, B, C using a date filter:

I make a filter for table 1 as: SAP.GETDIMENSIONFILTER("Table1","Date",4,4,1)

For table 2 I want to use the overwrite dimension filter, so I can filter the Date dimension using same filter as on Table 1. For example if in Table1 the filter is 082024-102024 then filter for Table2 should us the same dates, and then I can construct on Excel table 3. 

I haven't found clear examples of how to use SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER, and it isn´t working for me. I try to use: SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER("Table2","Period", D3,D4,D5, 5,1). 

D3,D4,D5 are the cells which contain the members I need to filter. For the example, 08/2024,09/2024 and 10/2024. 

Any idea or example of how to use this formula or achieve table 3. 

Thanks in advanced, 

 

Maria

entry.title: Import to model ended unexpectedly. Error code: 5007
entry.content:
Hi expert,

In SAC import job - When, I do refresh in one of the import job keep getting "Import to model ended unexpectedly. Error code: 5007" 

Also , i noticed that one of the filter FG Plant = WF15 causing this issue.

I understand that its related to memory issue, kindly help me to provide Solution/workaround to resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajkumar

entry.title: Import to model ended unexpectedly. Error code: 5007
entry.content:
Hi expert,

In SAC import job - When, I do refresh in one of the import job keep getting "Import to model ended unexpectedly. Error code: 5007" 

Also , i noticed that one of the filter FG Plant = WF15 causing this issue.

I understand that its related to memory issue, kindly help me to provide Solution/workaround to resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajkumar

entry.title: Change SAC Story Data source from HANA Model to SAP Datasphere Model
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have requirement to change SAC Story Data source from HANA Model to SAP Datasphere Model as we are migrating from SAP HANA Cloud to SAP Datasphere. We have hundreds of SAC stories built on hundreds of Live SAP HANA Cloud CALC views direct connection SAC models. As we are migrating From HANA Cloud to SAP Datasphere what is a best approach for a minimal impact/efforts on existing SAC Stories.

entry.title: SAC | Creating dynamic thresholds for the sac tables.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm currently facing a challenge where a client has requested a feature in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). They need a table that has threshold, but they want the ability to adjust these thresholds (change the thresholds ranges) dynamically without having to go through the process of editing the entire story each time. Is there a way to implement such functionality in SAC? 

Any insights would be appreciated.

entry.title: AZT_TM_adhoc Report deprecation date confirmation
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We would like to know the confirmed date for the deprecation of Ad Hoc Report.

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: Link between Stories
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I want to create a main story that serves as the base for 4 other stories. In other words, I want to add the links to each story so that when the client wants to access them, they go through this main story first. Is there a way to implement this functionality?

Thank you,
Ganjos

entry.title: How to show a custom message in story while the table values load from live connection?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a story where I'm pulling the data from SAP source. There are multiple widgets in the story and few tables and charts are using the SAP source to pull the data into the story. My requirement is to show a custom message to the users until all the data is refreshed in the story. 

Anyone who has faced similar issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Chart should always highlight the newest date in date range with a specific color
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Although i have already found a solution to my problem i wanted to ask the experts if there is a easier way to achieve my goal. My case i fairly simple. I have created a story filter for my date dimension. It is a filter by range with a custom filter input and the filter looks back three periods (three years in this instance). This way the user can select the year he wants and the selected year + the last three years are shown in the widget.

Now I have multiple column charts that show the amount of measure in the different year. Because of the filter the selected year + the last three year is shown.

The problem is I want a easy way to distinguish between the selected year and the last three years.

A way to do so would be to color the current year in a different way. However when the select year is changed the applied color is still applied to the same year. Therefore this method does not work.

The same problem arises if you create a color palette with three times the sames color and one time a different color. The color sequence just gets repeated. So if the data starts in 2014 the first three years are grey (2014, 2015, 2016) and the fourth is green (2017). However the next three years (2018, 2019, 2020) are grey again and so on.

As I already said I actually found already a way to achieve what i want. You would have to create two restricted measures based on the measure which should be shown in the chart. Both restricted measures are restricted by the date dimension. If you select for the values "select by range" you can select the custom input filter and therefore the selected year. For the first measure you just want the selected year. For the second measure you only want the last three years. Therefore you still select the custom input filter however you offset it by one and look back two years. This way you have a measure for the selected year and for the last three years and you can assign a color accordingly.

Although the solution explained above works. I would have to create two more restricted measures for each chart i have. Therefore I wanted to ask if someone else knows another way.

Thanks in advance for your replies

entry.title: Azure, IAS, and Cloud Apps Authentication
entry.content:
Hi All, Hi @Matthew_Shaw  

@Matthew_Shaw thank you so much for your help!

Now a clarification question: We have Azure as IdP, IAS as a proxy, and cloud apps like SAC configured. We provision users from Azure to IAS and then to SAC.

Ideally, we would like to log in to the apps  (like SAC) using an employee number (e.g., 283268).

I can of course provision the employee number (283268) from Azure to IAS in the "Login Name" field and then to SAP SAC in the "USER ID". However, when a user tries to log in to SAC, they cannot log in with the employee number (283268). This user is not found in Azure. If the user logs in with the email address, the login works. What am I doing wrong here?

Question 1: Is it possible to authenticate in cloud apps (such as SAC) using an employee number from Azure (since users are redirected to Azure for authentication)?

Question 2: In Azure, the UPN is set as the email address, e.g., firstname.lastname@mail.com. If I form the username "f.lastname" from firstname.lastname@mail.com and transfer it from Azure -> IAS -> SAC, can the user log in with "f.lastname"? Will this user be found in Azure with "f.lastname"? What is the best attribute from Azure to provision to the USER ID for authentication?

Thank you again. Unfortunately, I am stuck here and need help.

 

Best Regards

entry.title: SAC - Updata data loaded from local file
entry.content:
Hello, 

with  a job I added in my SAC model,  data from local file ( like a budget) , and protect the data loaded again transactional  data from SAP .

like 

DATE, CUSTOMER ID ,NAME , FUNCTION PARTNER, QTY, VALUE

Now I need to update Function partner based on what I have in transactional data because si changed in SAP.

I don't want to create a new job, map and transform data, validate etc.

If there a way to update these data with  ( stupid example) update ..from ..where ? 

Kind regards

Gildo

entry.title: Split an overall value data according to start date and end date
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Need a solution for this scenario.

Eg, I have a contract with a building from 15.05.2023 - 14.05.2024. In this period I have got a contract amount of 1,25,000 as revenue. Now in my table I want to split this value for each month according to contract start date and end date to show my revenue of each month. 

Is it possible to achieve this in SAC .

Not really required with the same table format but the concept support is required.

Regards,

Sunandha

entry.title: Is Seamless Planning between SAC and SAP Datasphere active?
entry.content:
Good day,

Is the seamless planning functionality active, or is it still planned for a future release? I'm trying to use it, but I don't see the option to select the "Data Storage Location" when creating a new model in SAC. Additionally, I've noticed that in the administration section, under tenant links, there is no option to enter the URL for the Data Storage Location (SAP Datasphere). Please advise if seamless planning is active for any tenants or if it is still a feature that will be released later.

entry.title: Need Help with Column-Level Data Access Control in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project in SAP Datasphere where I need to implement column-level data access control. Specifically, I want to restrict access to certain columns in my tables or models based on user roles. For example:

  • The finance team should only see finance-related columns, while inventory-related columns should be hidden from them.

In addition, I have created a story where:

  • Management can view all the KPI columns coming from the model in Datasphere.
  • If the sales team accesses the same story, only the sales-related KPIs should be displayed, while the rest of the KPIs are hidden.

Questions:

  1. How can I implement this scenario in SAP Datasphere?
  2. Are there any detailed steps or best practices to dynamically filter columns based on user roles in stories?

Any guidance, resources, or similar use case examples would be extremely helpful!

Thanks in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: SAC story variable prompt screen - change default mode from range to member selection
entry.content:
Hello,

I am building a story (optimized design) based on a BW Live Data Model. One of the variables in the underlying BW query is the Company code, which I need to be a mandatory variable with user input, no initial value. I already set it up as intended at query level.

The issue is, when the story is opened and the variable prompt pops up, the default mode to input the Company code is always a range (see screenshot).

Is there a way for the prompt to default to the "=" mode for user input? As in the second screenshot below?

I know the users can just switch the mode manually every time, but I am trying to improve user experience and get the variable prompt to default to "=", instead of "[ ]". Is this possible at all?

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: SAC - List of all classic stories / List of all classic apps
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

we would like to migrate our classic stories to optimized stories.

The conversion tool seems not to be able to do a system wide search for all classic stories.
Or at least our search attempts with "*"  or " "  doesn't work.

As far as we see it you have to go folder by folder until you get stories displayed.

Is there another way to find all classic stories?
Could the system overview Feature Adoption somehow be modified/used for it? The default view requires also folder browsing, although you see folders with Open Classic % which helps (hopefully the classic story was opened in the the timeframe selected ....).

And same question then for classic apps....

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: Configuration in S/4HANA for mapping SAC Account type inSAC
entry.content:
While loading GL Account hierarchy from S/4HANA using C_GLACCOUNTHIERARCHYNODE_SRV I am not getting correct value of SAC Account type field. Could you let me know what configuration needs to be done in S/4HANA to ensure SAC Account type is properly updated in the CDS and Odata services.

 

Regards,

Iqubal
